summary:
Agent2 would prioritize addressing any obstructed airways immediately after receiving advanced crash notification data from AACN sensors due to its direct impact on survivability. The primary focus is always securing open air passages followed closely by assessing consciousness levels as per standard trauma care protocols. To summarize:

1. Addressing airway obstruction takes top priority regardless of available technologies like AACN.
2. Ensuring unobstructed airflow maximizes chance of survival until further treatment can be administered.
